title: onoseris rupestris
intro: Onoseris rupestris, also known as Onoseris, is a genus of flowering plants in the dandelion family. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Onoseris rupestris include reducing blood pressure, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from fever and pain. Herbal preparations of Onoseris rupestris can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
